    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    G

    game - package game
     
    game.bomb - package game.bomb
     
    game.buff - package game.buff
     
    game.character - package game.character
     
    game.entity - package game.entity
     
    game.map - package game.map
     
    game.util - package game.util
     
    GameController - Class in gui
    GameController is responsible for: • Wiring JavaFX timers • Handling keyboard / mouse input • Rendering the grid • Delegating everything else to domain classes It does NOT contain movement AI, blast-zone math, spawn logic, or score math.
    GameController(StageData, String) - Constructor for class gui.GameController
     
    gameOver() - Method in class gui.GameController
     
    GameOverController - Class in gui
     
    GameOverController(Status, StageData, String) - Constructor for class gui.GameOverController

    GameProgress() - Constructor for class model.GameProgress
     
    GameProgressTest - Class in Unnamed Package
     
    GameProgressTest() - Constructor for class GameProgressTest
